reviews.review_description: With this image quality... trust me, wont worth

Would like very much to see this but unfortunately it just will not install. I am using galaxy s7 edge,  got more than enough space on my phone but can't figure out what the problem is. Very frustrated.
I've tried installing multiple times. The second it finishes download 600+ MBs, it says install fail. I've tried downloading in both VR and through the oculus app.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for contacting us to explain any possible circumstance that may affect the downloading process in your case.  Please contact us for any possible question by e-mail to the address shown in our web.
info@themustofthesea.com

reviews.review_description: Thanks to virtual reality, those Who for some reason in particular, cannot dive, now they have a new possibility wich brings them closer to what we, as divers can feel. Know, enjoy, plan, promote and protect seabeds through Virtual Reality!
Video is so blurry it is almost unwatchable...By the time You read this I will have uninstalled it...waste of money..

reviews.review_title: Don't buy and waste your money
reviews.review_description: The app won't install on my phone it goes threw the download but won't go any further I want a refund this is bull crap

Far better video's available free on YouTube!

I want my money back!
